text: Open the console, then reload the page
AI CLI tools hide your usage data in obscure local files. TokenTracker aggregates them into a single, beautiful dashboard in real-time.
100% local processing. No prompts or code are ever collected.
Token Tracker — Made by developers, for developers.
Automatically monitor token usage across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and more. Local-first, privacy-focused, and zero manual configuration.
A new version of TokenTracker is available.
Right-click your desktop → Edit Widgets → search "TokenTracker"
Limits load via your GitHub OAuth token. To also record per-token usage, enable Copilot's OpenTelemetry export and add these lines to your shell profile (~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc):
